SessionStart.command: bash -lc 'set -eo pipefail; ROOT=""; for c in "${COPILOT_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "$HOME/.vscode-insiders/agent-plugins/github.com/iasiv5/plugin" "$HOME/.vscode/agent-plugins/github.com/iasiv5/plugin" /mnt/c/Users/*/.vscode-insiders/agent-plugins/github.com/iasiv5/plugin /mnt/c/Users/*/.vscode/agent-plugins/github.com/iasiv5/plugin; do [ -n "$c" ] || continue; [ -f "$c/plugin.json" ] || continue; ROOT="$c"; break; done; [ -n "$ROOT" ] || { echo "[session-logger] plugin root not found, skip."; exit 0; }; SCRIPT="${HOOK_SCRIPT:-}"; [ -n "$SCRIPT" ] || { echo "[session-logger] HOOK_SCRIPT is empty, skip."; exit 0; }; exec bash "$ROOT/$SCRIPT"'
SessionStart.windows: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { if (Test-Path ([System.IO.Path]::Combine([Environment]::GetFolderPath('UserProfile'), '.vscode-insiders\agent-plugins\github.com\iasiv5\plugin\hooks\session-logger\run-hook.ps1'))) { & ([System.IO.Path]::Combine([Environment]::GetFolderPath('UserProfile'), '.vscode-insiders\agent-plugins\github.com\iasiv5\plugin\hooks\session-logger\run-hook.ps1')) } elseif (Test-Path ([System.IO.Path]::Combine([Environment]::GetFolderPath('UserProfile'), '.vscode\agent-plugins\github.com\iasiv5\plugin\hooks\session-logger\run-hook.ps1'))) { & ([System.IO.Path]::Combine([Environment]::GetFolderPath('UserProfile'), '.vscode\agent-plugins\github.com\iasiv5\plugin\hooks\session-logger\run-hook.ps1')) } else { Write-Output '[session-logger] plugin root not found, skip.'; exit 0 } }"

Stop.command: bash -lc 'set -eo pipefail; ROOT=""; for c in "${COPILOT_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "$HOME/.vscode-insiders/agent-plugins/github.com/iasiv5/plugin" "$HOME/.vscode/agent-plugins/github.com/iasiv5/plugin" /mnt/c/Users/*/.vscode-insiders/agent-plugins/github.com/iasiv5/plugin /mnt/c/Users/*/.vscode/agent-plugins/github.com/iasiv5/plugin; do [ -n "$c" ] || continue; [ -f "$c/plugin.json" ] || continue; ROOT="$c"; break; done; [ -n "$ROOT" ] || { echo "[session-logger] plugin root not found, skip."; exit 0; }; SCRIPT="${HOOK_SCRIPT:-}"; [ -n "$SCRIPT" ] || { echo "[session-logger] HOOK_SCRIPT is empty, skip."; exit 0; }; exec bash "$ROOT/$SCRIPT"'
